{{Quote|Let the Force flow through you.|The Jedi Trainer|<ref name="JO">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref>}}
The '''Jedi Trainer''' was among the first members of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[New Jedi Order]].

==Biography==
The Jedi Trainer was an instructor at the [[Jedi Praxeum|Academy]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] by at least [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. Later that same year he fought alongside [[Kyle Katarn]] to defend the Praxeum from an assault by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Desann]] and his [[Reborn]].<ref name="JO" />

The Jedi Trainer was among the six [[Jedi Knight/Legends|knights]] and masters assigned [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|initiates]] to train to Knighthood by Master Skywalker. Later that year he was among the Jedi sent to [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] to [[Battle of Korriban (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|prevent]] [[Tavion Axmis]]'s [[Disciples of Ragnos|Sith cult]] from resurrecting [[Marka Ragnos]]. He accompanied [[Jaden Korr]] and several other knights into the catacombs before the group split up; by the time Jaden emerged into the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]], he had made his way to the top of a large stone monument where he single-handedly engaged a pair of Reborn. It is not known if he survived this battle.<ref name="JA">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>

==Lightsabers==
[[File:JKA_jeditrainer.png|thumb|130px|float|left|The Jedi Trainer wielding his two lightsabers]]The Jedi Trainer was a skilled duelist, preferring to wield a pair of purple-bladed lightsabers in the [[Jar'Kai/Legends|Jar'Kai]] fashion. Two years after attaining the rank of knight, he crafted a lightsaber similar to the lightsaber that he wielded during the [[Battle of Yavin 4 (Empire Reborn)|battle of Yavin IV]].

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' there are multiple Jedi Trainer [[Wikipedia:Non player character|NPCs]], since there was only a pool of three unique Jedi skins to draw from. Three can be seen in the map <tt>yavin_temple</tt>, and also three in the map <tt>yavin_courtyard </tt>(one of them is always already dead at the final stage of the level;so we could think that there are only three Jedi Trainers in the Jedi temple)<tt> </tt>. In ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'', however, the Jedi Trainer is treated as an individual character; only one NPC is present in any one level. Because of this, it can be assumed that only one of the Jedi Trainer NPCs seen in ''Jedi Outcast'' is the actual "Jedi Trainer," with the others merely placeholders for unknown Jedi.

In ''Jedi Outcast'', the Jedi Trainer was voiced by [[Milton James]];<ref name="JO" /> in ''Jedi Academy'', his voice was provided by [[Cam Clarke]].<ref name="JA" />

The first screenshots of the game (published after the E3 2001) show the Jedi Trainer battling [[Kyle Katarn]] on [[Kejim]] and wielding a red lightsaber, at that time causing many fans to believe he was a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] and Kyle's rival in the upcoming game.

If the player helps the Jedi Trainer out in his predicament, then it guarantees his survival.
